item.title: Version 1.5.8
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.8

Subject Model & Classroom Metadata

  • Per-Classroom Book Metadata: Refactored Subject models to define dynamic Book metadata (Publisher and Total Pages) distinctly per assigned Classroom rather than globally.
  • Dynamic Class Bindings: Upgraded the Subject Editor to list dynamically bound classes, allowing editors to assign distinct curriculum values instantly per class context.
  • Accurate Stats Reporting: Fixed the Syllabus Stats Tracker UI to reliably interpret limits based solely on the current class context to prevent inaccurate aggregate reporting.

Enhanced UI & Editors

  • Subject Editor Redesign: Refactored classroom selection grid to use TigleGroupedCard for better visual grouping and consistency.
  • Book Coverage Redesign: Redesigned "Book Coverage" card with a percentage pill, inline remaining count, and a visual progress bar using TigleProgressBar.
  • Page Range Warnings: Added a warning confirmation in the Chapter Editor if the page range exceeds the book's defined total pages.
  • Subject Cards: Moved page count to the top-right tag for a cleaner card layout.
  • Dashboard KPIs: Standardized all dashboard KPIs to use TigleStatCard with rich text metric support via new valueWidget property.

Data Integrity

  • Cascading Deletes: Implemented "Clean Sweep" cascading deletes for Classrooms to prevent orphaned data in Isar. Automatically purges Syllabus, Planning, and Review data when a Classroom is deleted.
  • Delete Warnings: Enhanced delete confirmation dialogs to explicitly warn about associated data loss.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where removing a subject from a classroom in School Structure did not persist due to IsarLink transaction constraints.
  • Fixed a bug where assigning subjects to classrooms via School Structure did not update the classroomMetas count on the Subjects summary screen.

UI Kit Cleanup

  • Removed TigleIndexStatCard from the UI Kit to simplify the design system.
  • Standardized header layouts and bulk selection controls across editors.
